since_last: 35% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.92%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC +1.03% · Gold -0.26% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 35% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.92%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.92%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.88%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +17.91%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +17.91%, MU +8.33%, VRT +7.49%, IBM +5.94%, ZBRA +5.38%. Laggards: SPCX -15.31%, AVAV -10.50%, ARM -8.16%, PLTR -7.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -15.31% at $156.68
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -15.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
